message:
feat(freeze): Add add_brand opcode Zig support

Convert add_brand opcode to support both C and Zig output.
This opcode adds a brand to an object for private field initialization.

Stack effect: [obj, func] -> [] (pops 2)

Implementation:
- Pops func and obj from stack
- Calls JS_FrozenAddBrand helper function
- Frees both obj and func references
- Returns exception if operation fails
- In Zig: uses block expressions for POP
- In C: uses POP() macro and FROZEN_FREE
